title: Fluffy Syrian Beef Kebabs
description: A paleo-friendly twist on traditional Syrian beef kebabs, featuring lean minced beef and a delicate floral flavor.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the minced beef, chopped onion, parsley, mint, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Using your hands or a wooden spoon, mix the ingredients until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Add the lemon juice and olive oil, and mix until the ingredients are well coated.
Add the baking powder and mix until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small kebabs, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Thread the kebabs onto skewers, leaving a small space between each kebab.
Grill the kebabs for 3-4 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with additional parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
